nasb.text: Now in the twelfth year of our exile, on the fifth of the tenth month, the refugees from Jerusalem came to me, saying, “The city has been taken.”

esv.text: In the twelfth year of our exile, in the tenth month, on the fifth day of the month, a fugitive from Jerusalem came to me and said, “The city has been struck down.”

cnv.text: 在我們被擄以後的第十二年十月初五日，有人從耶路撒冷逃到我這裡來，說：“城已經被攻陷了。”

ccb.text: 在我们被掳后第十二年十月五日，有人从耶路撒冷逃出来对我说：“城已经沦陷了。”
